ranking_variants.weak_v1_rank: current_score plus weak repair families and explicit weak risk penalties
ranking_variants.weak_v2_rank: weak_v1_rank plus a small B2 rebound penalty and clean W-A/W-C boost
ranking_variants.weak_v3_rank: diagnostic candidate: weak_v2_rank minus remaining weak_v2 loser groups; improves mean but must reduce negatives before production use
ranking_variants.weak_v4_rank: diagnostic candidate: weak_v3_rank plus BBI/BIAS/OBV boosts and penalties from daily_indicators.extra_factors_jsonb

diagnosis: Weak PASS/WATCH has almost no baseline edge over FAIL, so weak ranking should be used only to reduce top-list damage and find repair candidates, not to promote broad PASS rules. weak_v4 adds BBI/BIAS/OBV as an offline indicator experiment and should not be promoted unless it beats weak_v3 on both mean return and negative rate.
